# Open Questions Template

## Purpose

Use this template to manage unresolved questions. Open questions are not decisions.

## Template Body

```md
# Open Questions

## Question Index

| ID | Question | Status | Scope | Owner | Resolution |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| OQ-0001 | <Question> | Open | <Scope> | <Owner> | Not resolved |

## OQ-0001: <Question Title>

Status: Open | In Review | Answered | Moved to ADR

Scope: Container | Direction: <name> | Service: <name>

### Question

Write the unresolved question.

### Context

Summarize relevant context briefly.

### Why It Matters

Explain the impact of the answer.

### Options

- Option A: <summary>
- Option B: <summary>

### Impact If Unresolved

- <Impact>

### Owner

<Owner or "Not assigned">

### Related Documents

- [<Document title>](<relative-link>)

### Resolution

Link to ADR or source document when answered.
```
